module.name: step
module.purpose: Owns the agent runtime Step type as a top-level agent module. Step holds a shared Arc<TaskState>, protocol step identity, and update sequencing, and owns task-step routing (route_step_event handling StepEvent::Trigger and StepEvent::Complete via on_complete, trigger_initial_plan, send_step_event, and send_plan_event), model-prompt rendering, and step/model completion handling. The Execution step arm delegates spawning to state.execution_hub.run_execution_step, and on_execution_complete builds the analysis follow-up plan and emits PlanEvent::Trigger; plan execution lives in PlanHub, so Step emits PlanEvent::Trigger instead of running plans directly.
